""" Build a display label for one location.
ruleStack: [(1, source.viml, source.viml),(3, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml)]

line: " The documentation comment remains active on this quoted line 🚀.
ruleStack: [(1, source.viml, source.viml),(3, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml)]

line: " It closes before the function declaration below.
ruleStack: [(1, source.viml, source.viml),(3, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml, source.viml comment.block.documentation.viml)]

line: autocmd BufReadPost * if line("'\"") > 0 | execute "normal! g`\"" | endif
autocmd ColorScheme * highlight default link OrbitHeader Title

syntax region OrbitQuoted start=+"+ skip=+\\"+ end=+"+ keepend
